method: matrix-free forward implicit sensitivity through coupled NESTOR-MHD residual

cth_3d.quantity: directional derivative of edge internal R_cos(0,0)

diii_d_axisymmetric.quantity: directional derivative of edge internal R_cos(0,0)
diii_d_axisymmetric.direction: uniform relative scaling of all extcur groups

rejected_reverse_mode.reason: reverse trace through geometry-dependent NESTOR Green-matrix assembly remained compilation-bound

rejected_linearized_transpose.reason: jax.linear_transpose of the accepted forward JVP avoided the original retained reverse graph, but solvax GMRES still forced compilation of the complete geometry-dependent fused NESTOR full transpose. The production route requires a compact custom transpose at the NESTOR operator boundary, not another outer Krylov wrapper.

rejected_radial_block_warm_start.reason: NESTOR edge pressure depends on global plasma-current and magnetic-axis quantities, so the coupled Jacobian is not purely radial block-tridiagonal. The warm start reduced Krylov iterations but increased wall time and more than doubled peak memory.

rejected_direct_coil_forward_extension.case: Landreman-Paul QA direct Biot-Savart, ns8 mpol3 ntor3
rejected_direct_coil_forward_extension.reason: The Krylov derivative was stable, but reconverged direct-coil finite differences were neither step-stable nor consistently converged and disagreed with the implicit result. The experimental CoilSet API was removed; promotion requires a smooth strict-tolerance continuation or an independently parity-checked mgrid parameterization.
